results.rendered_html: 1. ayaśas (3. a + ya˚) n. Unehre, Schande: ayaśo mahadāpnoti  M. 8,128 .  R. 2,74,6 . 3,2,26 . 5,87,26 .  PAÑCAT. I, 248 . II, 116 . ayaśaḥ pramṛṣṭam  RAGH. 6,41 . sarveṣām — ayaśaskari (voc. f.)  HIḌ. 3,18 .

results.rendered_html: 2. ayaśas (wie eben) adj. unangenehm, unschön, unwerth: indriyeṇa te yaśasā yaśa ādada ityayaśā ha bhavati  ŚAT. BR. 14,9,4,7  (=  BṚH. ĀR. UP. 6,4,7 .) anūcāno 'pyayaśā yajeta  KĀTY. ŚR. 15,3,24 .

results.rendered_html:
ayaśas a. Disreputable, infamous, disgraceful; also ayaśaska in this sense.
— n. (śaḥ) Infamy, disgrace, ignominy, ill-repute, stain, dishonour, scandal; ayaśo mahadāpnoti  Ms. 8. 128 ; kimayaśo nanu ghoramataḥ paraṃ  U. 3. 27 ; svabhāvaloletyayaśaḥ pramṛṣṭaṃ  R. 6. 41. 
Comp.
— kara a. (rī f.) disgraceful, ignominious.
